_comment: Deployment facts for this project, read by morfdeploy. The four install steps live in one place for the whole parc; this file states only what is specific to this service. Adding a platform never touches this file.
description: Reference service of the morfSystem ecosystem
_comment_app_dir: Where the binary and configurations are installed, per platform. Overridden by the MORF_APP_DIR environment variable, which replaces the per-project prefixes (MT_, MN_, MS_) that had already drifted apart.
_comment_configs: Copied at install. 'overwrite' is false by default because these hold settings edited by hand on the machine. An absolute destination is honoured as-is, which is how the shared parc configuration reaches /etc/morfsystem.
